archive_page.title: Archive
archive_page.subtitle: Official records of past PABSEC General Assemblies. Resolutions, programmes and minutes are available on the official PABSEC website.
archive_page.full_archive_desc: The complete archive of resolutions, programmes and session minutes is available on the official PABSEC website.

event_page.programme_coming_desc: The detailed programme will be published closer to the event date.
event_page.documents_desc: Resolutions, reports and session documents are published on the official PABSEC website. Draft documents for delegates will be made available prior to the session.
event_page.venue_body: The {title} will be held in {location}. Full venue details will be shared with registered delegates.
event_page.visa_body: Visa requirements depend on your nationality. PABSEC Secretariat can provide invitation letters upon request to support visa applications.
event_page.accommodation_body: A list of recommended hotels near the venue will be shared with registered delegates. Early booking is advised as availability may be limited.
event_page.contact_sec_body: For queries regarding practical arrangements, please contact the PABSEC Secretariat directly via the Contact page.
event_page.practical_note: Full practical information will be distributed to registered delegates ahead of the session.
event_page.register_desc: Complete the form below to register as a delegate, observer or accredited participant. You will receive a confirmation by e-mail after submission.
event_page.reg_closed_desc: This assembly has concluded. Registration is no longer available.
event_page.doc_no_docs: No documents have been uploaded for this language yet.

about_page.title: About PABSEC
about_page.subtitle: The Parliamentary Assembly of the Black Sea Economic Cooperation brings together parliamentarians from member states to advance regional cooperation.
about_page.body_1: PABSEC is the parliamentary dimension of the Organisation of the Black Sea Economic Cooperation (BSEC). It provides an inter-parliamentary forum for the member states of BSEC to discuss matters of common concern and promote regional cooperation on political, economic, social and cultural issues.
about_page.body_2: The General Assembly — the supreme body of PABSEC — convenes twice per year and is composed of parliamentarians delegated by the national parliaments of member states. It adopts resolutions, elects the Bureau, and approves the programme and budget.
about_page.body_3: The PABSEC International Secretariat is headquartered in Istanbul, Republic of Türkiye, and coordinates the work of the Assembly between sessions.
